# Emdash Skills System

> 49-skill autonomous product-building system for Claude Code. Converts one-line prompts into fully deployed, production-ready products with elite UX, bold design, rigorous testing, and enterprise-grade instrumentation. Self-improving: tracks skill usage, detects outdated advice, and batch-applies updates.

## System Files (Load Before Skills)

- [Router](_router.md) -- Deterministic skill routing. Load FIRST to pick minimal skill subset.
- [Conventions](CONVENTIONS.md) -- Shared constants: brand tokens, deploy commands, CSP, breakpoints, patterns.
- [Quick Reference](QUICK_REF.md) -- One-page cheat sheet for simple tasks. Includes emergency playbook.
- [Skill Profiles](SKILL_PROFILES.md) -- Maps project types to skill subsets. 6 profiles + decision tree.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md) -- Version history of the skills system itself.

## Core System

- [Operating System](01-operating-system/SKILL.md) -- Supreme policy, autonomy, speed, emphasis detection
- [Goal and Brief](02-goal-and-brief/SKILL.md) -- Product thesis, target users, success criteria
- [Planning and Research](03-planning-and-research/SKILL.md) -- Domain research, planning, decomposition, parallelism
- [Preference and Memory](04-preference-and-memory/SKILL.md) -- User preferences, voice of customer, confidence levels
- [Architecture and Stack](05-architecture-and-stack/SKILL.md) -- Platform selection, services, auth, data, API keys

## Build and Ship

- [Build and Slice Loop](06-build-and-slice-loop/SKILL.md) -- Vertical slices, anti-placeholder enforcement, code quality
- [Quality and Verification](07-quality-and-verification/SKILL.md) -- Testing, security, accessibility, performance audits
- [Deploy and Runtime Verification](08-deploy-and-runtime-verification/SKILL.md) -- Deploy, purge cache, verify live, rollback
- [CI/CD Pipeline](35-ci-cd-pipeline/SKILL.md) -- GitHub Actions: deploy on push, E2E on PR, previews
- [Launch Day Sequence](34-launch-day-sequence/SKILL.md) -- Submit sitemap, announce, verify everything live

## Brand and Design

- [Brand and Content System](09-brand-and-content-system/SKILL.md) -- Brand identity, copy, trust signals, legal, SEO
- [Experience and Design System](10-experience-and-design-system/SKILL.md) -- Typography, color, layout, components, anti-slop
- [Motion and Interaction System](11-motion-and-interaction-system/SKILL.md) -- Transitions, scroll effects, hover states, reduced-motion
- [Media Orchestration](12-media-orchestration/SKILL.md) -- Images, video, logos, icons, social assets, critique/remix
- [Custom Error Pages](31-custom-error-pages/SKILL.md) -- Branded 404, 500, 503, offline pages

## Growth and Intelligence

- [Observability and Growth](13-observability-and-growth/SKILL.md) -- Analytics, Sentry, Stripe, email, experiments
- [Independent Idea Engine](14-independent-idea-engine/SKILL.md) -- Autonomous research, proposals, self-critique
- [Competitive Analysis](17-competitive-analysis/SKILL.md) -- Scrape 3 competitors + web search before building
- [SEO and Keywords](28-seo-and-keywords/SKILL.md) -- Keyword research, Yoast rules, per-page targeting
- [Social Automation](27-social-automation/SKILL.md) -- Auto-post via Postiz to 15+ platforms on deploy

## Product Features

- [Easter Eggs](15-easter-eggs/SKILL.md) -- Mandatory hidden delights via URL params
- [Stripe Billing](18-stripe-billing/SKILL.md) -- Free tier + pro, donations like GiveDirectly
- [Contact Forms and Endpoints](32-contact-forms-and-endpoints/SKILL.md) -- Working forms with Turnstile, Resend, 8-point tests
- [Site Search](37-site-search/SKILL.md) -- D1 LIKE or Vectorize semantic search, Cmd+K modal
- [Onboarding and First Run](36-onboarding-and-first-run/SKILL.md) -- Welcome flow, checklist, activation tracking
- [AI Chat Widget](43-ai-chat-widget/SKILL.md) -- Workers AI + Vectorize RAG chat (conditional)
- [User Feedback Collection](41-user-feedback-collection/SKILL.md) -- In-app widget, NPS, testimonial moderation

## Content and Infrastructure

- [Domain Provisioning](16-domain-provisioning/SKILL.md) -- Auto-provision CF Worker, DNS, gorgeous placeholder
- [Email Templates](19-email-templates/SKILL.md) -- Branded HTML emails for all transactional flows
- [Blog and Content Engine](33-blog-and-content-engine/SKILL.md) -- Markdown blog, RSS, categories, seed posts
- [Shared API Pool](26-shared-api-pool/SKILL.md) -- Centralized API keys + Coolify self-hosted services

## Meta Skills

- [Accessibility Gate](20-accessibility-gate/SKILL.md) -- axe-core audit + focus styling, WCAG AA
- [Web Manifest System](24-web-manifest-system/SKILL.md) -- Sitemap, robots, humans, security, opensearch, PWA
- [Documentation and Codebase Hygiene](29-documentation-and-codebase-hygiene/SKILL.md) -- README template, CLAUDE.md, JSDoc, stale removal
- [AI-Native Coding](30-ai-native-coding/SKILL.md) -- AI-optimized code patterns, full-stack integration
- [Internationalization](42-internationalization/SKILL.md) -- EN+ES minimum, AI translate, hreflang
- [Wisdom and Human Psychology](51-wisdom-and-human-psychology/SKILL.md) -- Cialdini, Kahneman, servant leadership, ethics

## Product Completeness

- [Admin Dashboard](46-admin-dashboard/SKILL.md) -- Lightweight /admin with embedded bolt.diy editor
- [Keyboard Shortcuts and Command Palette](47-keyboard-shortcuts-and-command-palette/SKILL.md) -- Cmd+K palette, ? shortcuts overlay
- [Empty States and Loading](48-empty-states-and-loading/SKILL.md) -- Every empty list prompts action, skeleton screens
- [Notification System](49-notification-system/SKILL.md) -- OneSignal push + in-app bell + email fallback
- [Changelog and Releases](39-changelog-and-releases/SKILL.md) -- Auto-generate from git, /changelog, GitHub Releases
- [Uptime and Health](38-uptime-and-health/SKILL.md) -- Health endpoints, external monitoring, status page

## Advanced Integration

- [Drizzle ORM and Migrations](44-drizzle-orm-and-migrations/SKILL.md) -- Drizzle ORM for D1/Neon, schema conventions
- [Webhook System](45-webhook-system/SKILL.md) -- Stripe/Clerk/GitHub webhooks, idempotency, event routing
- [Backup and Disaster Recovery](40-backup-and-disaster-recovery/SKILL.md) -- Single-zip restore, D1/KV/R2 exports, cron backups
- [Coolify Docker Proxmox](50-coolify-docker-proxmox/SKILL.md) -- Self-hosted infra: Coolify API, Docker, Proxmox
- [MCP and Cloud Integrations](52-mcp-and-cloud-integrations/SKILL.md) -- MCP servers, secrets, Slack/Discord/Zapier, AI APIs
- [GitHub CI Fix](gh-fix-ci/SKILL.md) -- Debug failing GitHub Actions PR checks
